title: phyllanthus pronyensis
intro: Phyllanthus pronyensis, also known as the Pronephelium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It has been found to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of malaria, as well as potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Phyllanthus pronyensis, such as infusions or decoctions, are sometimes used in traditional medicine, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
